elements.text: You made plans with a group of friends to go out to dinner on a Friday night. When they come to pick you up, you see that they are dressed casually, but you decided to dress up a bit, and you think they might judge you. You decide that you like what you're wearing, and go to dinner...

elements.name: your_own_style--mental_health--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
